news.title: Huawei unveils new approach to strengthen dominance in high-end chips
news.description: Huawei claims the new advanced chips that it has planned to make are based on the Tau Scaling Law that could achieve transistor density levels equivalent to 1.4 nm.

news.description: Tells Linux users to either pay up or get stuck on an aging, unsupported version forever.
